themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "What 'necessary things' has God provided through unexpected sources in your journey?".
